song.title: My Goal is God Himself
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) My goal is God Himself, Not joy, nor peace, Nor even blessing, But Himself, my God; ’Tis His to lead me there— Not mine but His— At any cost, dear Lord, by any road.
[V2] 2) So faith bounds forward To its goal in God, And love can trust her Lord to lead her there; Upheld by Him, My soul is foll’wing hard Till God hath full fulfilled my deepest prayer.
[V3] 3) No matter if the way Be sometimes dark, No matter though The cost be oft-times great, He knoweth how I Best shall reach the mark, The way that leads to Him Must needs be strait.
[V4] 4) One thing I know, I cannot say Him nay; One thing I do, I press towards my Lord; My God, my glory here, From day to day, And in the glory there my Great Reward
